rationale: extends chain forms a cycle (a -> b -> a). deacon resolves eagerly and detects the loop (no stack overflow — good); the reference does not resolve extends at read-configuration so it accepts. Characterized divergence: eager (deacon) vs lazy (reference) extends resolution. See CLAUDE.md 'Verified Non-Bugs' and errors/README.md (issue #297): extends is a deacon capability ahead of the reference, not drift.
